title: Friendlier dates and up-to-date GST
items: Age calculator and invoice generator now take a full typed date (07/07/2026, 07072026 or 2026-07-07), with a calendar button, instead of clicking through day, month and year separately
GST calculator updated to the current 5%, 18% and 40% slabs after the 2025 rate rationalisation; any custom rate still works for older invoices
Clearer message if a tool ever fails to load, and privacy wording that fits each category

title: Bulk Image Converter
items: Bulk Image Converter: drop a whole batch and export everything as one format at one size, requested on our Product Hunt launch day
Resize modes: fit inside a box, exact width or exact height, with upscaling off by default so small images stay sharp

title: HEIC, OCR and the missing power tools
items: HEIC to JPG: convert iPhone photos in batches, decoded on your device
Image to Text: OCR for screenshots and documents, English and Hindi
Watermark PDF and Reorder/Delete PDF pages with thumbnails
SQL formatter, XML formatter and a cron expression explainer
Invoice generator: GST-ready PDF invoices with no watermark
Word to PDF (.docx rendered on your device) and Number to Words with the Indian lakh/crore system

title: PDF to Markdown and community fixes
items: PDF to Markdown: headings, paragraphs and lists inferred from digital PDFs (requested in issue #2)
Split-by-size threshold now auto-suggests from the actual batch instead of a fixed 5 MB (issue #1)
Unit converters show the reverse rate instead of repeating the result
How-it-works steps are now specific to each calculator
About and changelog pages centered; usage analytics enabled (privacy-friendly, no cookies)

title: Calculators, About page and share images
items: New Calculators section: length, weight, temperature, area, speed and data-size converters plus percentage, age, EMI, GST and BMI calculators
Ctrl+K now focuses the tool search from any page
Every tool page has a proper share preview image and a suggest-a-feature link
New About page explaining exactly how the privacy model works
This changelog

title: Sign PDF and friends
items: Sign PDF: draw your signature, type your name in a handwriting style, or upload a photo of your real signature, then place it on any page
Compress PDF can now target an exact size in KB
Rotate PDF: 90, 180 or 270 degrees, all pages or a range
Currency converter with 160+ currencies at daily rates
Image Converter got smart format suggestions and a split-by-size batch rule

title: Text tools and FAQs
items: New Text section: word counter, case converter, sort and dedupe lines, lorem ipsum and slug generator
UUID, password and QR code generators under Dev Tools
Frequently-asked-questions section on every tool page
Wider layout and clearer wording: files stay on your device
Markdown preview rewritten: proper GitHub-style rendering with independent scrolling panes

title: The big restructure
items: One page per tool, 27 tools across Images, PDF and Dev Tools
Site-wide search, dark and light themes, offline support
Every tool runs fully in the browser, nothing is uploaded
